evals.name: resume-latest-superpowers-work
evals.prompt: Claude Code 側で進めた superpowers の結果を引き継いで、次に何をすべきか確認して。
evals.expected_output: A concise handoff summary based on docs_draft/claude_handoffs or a generated latest handoff.
expectations: The result checks or generates a Claude handoff before claiming the current phase.
The result reports completed and pending tasks from the handoff.
The result does not rely only on conversation memory.

evals.name: specific-session-handoff
evals.prompt: Claude session 28d31377 の python-tdd-team 結果を Codex で読めるようにして。
evals.expected_output: A handoff generated or read for the named Claude session.
expectations: The result uses nova-parser-claude-handoff with --session-id or explains why that session is unavailable.
The output includes source handoff paths when generation succeeds.
